title: Property Consultant - Sunteck Realty - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Sunteck Realty - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Sunteck Realty, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sunteck Realty:
Sunteck Realty is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sunteck Realty!
